story.text:
# 📖 ⿻ Act XVIII: Hearing at Scale
**act** · mage · knowledge · plurality

The Hearing at Scale. Augmented deliberation, Pol.is.
> *The wise leader does not speak loudest but listens longest. Augmented deliberation gives democracy the ears it needs to hear its own wisdom.*

story.title: Read the full text
